untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition requires dual-bottom detection (Adam and Eve identification), valley/peak location tracking, temporal spacing validation (2-6 weeks apart), and rounded vs. spiked bottom morphology classification. These structural pattern elements cannot be expressed using only price, volume, and technical indicator conditions. The signal requires explicit pattern shape analysis and multi-week cycle detection unavailable in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture core entry signals: (1) at least 10% rise between bottoms using price change proxy, (2) volume confirmation with higher left bottom volume. Exit uses reversal below right bottom low. However, the complete pattern definition—identifying two distinct bottoms, measuring their separation in time, classifying bottom shapes (spike vs. rounded), and validating the 2-6 week optimal range—requires pattern recognition logic beyond technical indicators. A production implementation would need custom pattern detection functions.
